notes: Captured entries come verbatim from the 2026-07-03 smoke session debug logs (real Verse LSP against the VerseAutoImports test project). Book entries are compiler output preserved in the Book of Verse sources. Synthetic entries are hand-written shapes awaiting live capture.

entries.context: uefn-smoke T1: identifier used inside a class

uefn-smoke T3: identifier used inside a function
uefn-smoke T4: module name exists under two parents; note the trailing space after 'any of: '

entries.context: Book of Verse 16_modules (Script Error 3506): option list echoes a local definition; the bare option must not become an import. The one importable candidate left is treated as unambiguous, so Optimize adds it too

entries.context: assignment hint, never an import problem; guards the greedy Did-you-mean fallback
